items.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
items.summary: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

items.title: Trump and Boeing Announce China Will Purchase 200 Planes
items.summary: The deal, which Beijing has not commented on, would be a major win for Boeing, which has lost ground to Airbus in one of the world’s largest aviation markets.
